evals.prompt: Run /next when .state.md shows track=feature, step=develop, status=ready-to-promote, next_command=/staging
evals.expected_output: Auto-advance report showing it will invoke /staging, with track/step/branch context
expectations: Output displays the current track as 'feature'
Output invokes or recommends invoking the /staging command
Output does NOT attempt to implement anything itself

evals.expected_output: Report that no active workflow exists, suggest starting with /feature, /quick-fix, or /hotfix
expectations: Output suggests starting a new workflow with /feature, /quick-fix, or /hotfix
Output does NOT invoke any other command

evals.prompt: Run /next when .state.md shows status=blocked with blocker 'merge conflicts in src/app/page.tsx'
evals.expected_output: Report that workflow is blocked, show the blocker, suggest resolution
expectations: Output displays the specific blocker description
Output does NOT attempt to auto-advance past the block
